panels.title: Total atual por kind × source
panels.description: Snapshot atual da tabela inteira, independente do time range do dashboard — quebra por tipo de policy e origem.

targets.rawSql: SELECT kind, source, count(*) AS total FROM phone_policies GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY kind, total DESC

panels.title: Novas policies por dia, por kind
panels.description: Volume de policies criadas por dia (não cumulativo) — útil para identificar picos de blacklist automática vs. ações manuais.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, kind AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM phone_policies WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Distribuição por protocol
panels.description: Snapshot atual da tabela inteira, independente do time range do dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT protocol, count(*) AS total FROM phone_policies GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC

panels.title: Policies com expires_at futuro
panels.description: Snapshot atual — quantas policies ativas têm expiração agendada.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS active_with_expiry FROM phone_policies WHERE expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at > now()

panels.title: Top 10 reasons (blacklist)
panels.description: Snapshot atual da tabela inteira, independente do time range do dashboard — motivos mais frequentes nas policies de blacklist.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(reason, '∅') AS reason, count(*) AS total FROM phone_policies WHERE kind = 'blacklist' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Origem das policies (source)
panels.description: Snapshot atual da tabela inteira, independente do time range do dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT source, count(*) AS total FROM phone_policies GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC
